name: Author continuation accepts owned procedural leverage

source.purpose: Ensures Ch2+ Author validation accepts procedural material when a named actor uses it for human/institutional leverage.

currentLocation.name: departure dock
currentLocation.description: The dock where the sealed cargo left under private terms.

location.name: departure dock
location.description: The dock where the sealed cargo left under private terms.

established: The Driftrunner lifted with sealed cargo aboard.
The dockmaster watched the departure light.

turns.playerInput: I take the cargo and leave the dock.
turns.narratorProse: The Driftrunner lifts with the sealed container aboard and the dockmaster watching the departure light.

meaning.situation: The PC accepted sealed cargo under private broker terms.
meaning.tension: Private cargo trust survived only while clearance remained informal.
meaning.ticking: The release log remained the institutional trace of the deal.
meaning.question: Who can turn the private cargo promise into public record?
meaning.closer: The bay cleared, but the log remembered the shape of the favor.

transitionSeed.priorChapterMeant: The PC's private cargo acceptance created a name authorities can now test.
transitionSeed.earnedConsequence: A clearance officer can ask for the broker's name as the cost of clean release.
transitionSeed.worsenedDetail: The release log still has an owner field.
transitionSeed.unresolvedQuestion: Will the PC protect the broker when clean paperwork has a price?

chapter_frame.title: Hale Holds Clearance
chapter_frame.premise: Inspector Hale turns the prior cargo lift into a clearance bargain: move cleanly by naming the broker, or stay unmarked and lose the lane.
chapter_frame.active_pressure: Hale controls the release log the PC needs to keep the cargo moving.
chapter_frame.central_tension: Name the broker for clean clearance, or protect the secret and lose time.
chapter_frame.chapter_scope: One cargo bay, one inspector, one release log.
chapter_frame.objective: Leave the bay without giving Hale the broker's name.
chapter_frame.crucible: The PC must decide whether clean paperwork is worth betraying a prior deal.

outcome_spectrum.clean: Kessrin still calls you back; Laine promise still feels reachable.
outcome_spectrum.costly: Renn now treats you as an asset; Patel debt is owed.
outcome_spectrum.failure: Vasek now has your transponder ID; Sable contact is burned.
outcome_spectrum.catastrophic: Solitaire knows your face; the corridor hunts your registry forever.

opening_scene_spec.initial_state: After leaving the departure dock, the sealed container is aboard, but Hale has paused the release log before the lane clears.
opening_scene_spec.first_player_facing: Hale offers clean clearance if the PC names the broker behind the sealed cargo.
opening_scene_spec.immediate_choice: Name the broker for clean release or refuse and risk a traceable hold.
opening_scene_spec.dramatic_situation: Hale uses clearance to make the prior cargo bargain cost something personal.
opening_scene_spec.first_visible_pressure: The inspector can release the cargo or turn the hold into a record.
opening_scene_spec.first_human_or_institutional_move: Hale offers clean clearance in exchange for the broker's name.
withheld_premise_facts: Hale already knows the broker's initials from a separate log.

antagonist_field.core_pressure: Clean release requires a betrayal-shaped concession.

possible_faces.name: Inspector Hale
possible_faces.becomes_primary_when: The PC refuses to name the broker.

antagonist_field.escalation_logic: Each refusal makes Hale's courtesy more official and harder to walk back.

starting_npcs.name: Inspector Hale
starting_npcs.voice_note: smiles only after naming a cost
starting_npcs.disposition_reason: dock inspectors distrust sealed freight leaving on private terms

starting_npcs.name: Mira Voss
starting_npcs.disposition_reason: she has no prior tie and wants to avoid dock heat

starting_npcs.name: Corro Vale
starting_npcs.hidden_pressure: Can show who paused the log.
starting_npcs.disposition_reason: technicians avoid taking sides during inspections

active_threads.title: The intake problem
active_threads.question: Can the immediate problem stay coherent?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: The immediate intake problem is resolved.

active_threads.title: The broker name
active_threads.question: Will Hale get the broker name?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: The PC protects, trades, or loses the broker name.
active_threads.failure_mode: The broker name enters clearance records.

active_threads.title: The release log
active_threads.question: Can the log stay clean?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: The log clears, is spoofed, or records a trace.

active_threads.title: Witnessed pause
active_threads.question: Who paused the log?
active_threads.resolution_criteria: The pause is named or made irrelevant.

arc_link.chapter_function: Test whether cargo movement compromises prior contacts.
arc_link.player_stance_read: The PC protects private terms under institutional pressure.

pacing_contract.chapter_question: Can the PC leave without betraying the broker?
pacing_contract.early_pressure: Hale offers clean clearance for a name.
pacing_contract.late_pressure: The bay hold becomes authority record.

continuation_moves.prior_chapter_meaning: The PC accepted sealed cargo and made a private broker promise matter.
continuation_moves.larger_pattern_revealed: Dock authorities convert private cargo into public accountability.

new_named_threat_from_prior_success.name: Inspector Hale
new_named_threat_from_prior_success.emerged_from: the PC leaving with sealed freight

worsened_existing_thread.why_load_bearing_now: private terms can now be forced into public records

planted_midchapter_revelation.hidden_statement: Hale already had the broker's initials.
planted_midchapter_revelation.recontextualizes: His request tests loyalty more than knowledge.

continuation_dramatic_turn.prior_chapter_meant: The PC's private cargo acceptance created a name Hale can now try to extract.
continuation_dramatic_turn.larger_pattern_revealed: Clearance systems make private cargo relationships institutionally visible.

pressure_owner.why_they_now_act: He controls the release log before the cargo can leave cleanly.

human_leverage.what_they_can_take_or_offer: Hale can offer clean clearance or create a traceable hold.
human_leverage.what_they_need_from_pc: He needs the broker's name on record.

worsened_detail.prior_detail: The cargo was accepted on private broker terms.
worsened_detail.why_it_is_load_bearing_now: The release log can turn that private promise into evidence.

continuation_dramatic_turn.offscreen_antagonist_presence: The broker is absent; Hale's request makes that absence dangerous.

procedure_budget.dramatic_function: The log turns clean departure into a loyalty test.

pressure_ladder.trigger_condition: The PC refuses to name the broker.

pressure_ladder.pressure: Mira risks exposure by naming the pause.
pressure_ladder.trigger_condition: The PC protects Mira from Hale.
pressure_ladder.narrative_effect: Hale loses leverage over the cargo log.

pressure_ladder.trigger_condition: The broker name remains protected late.

possible_revelations.statement: Hale already has the broker's initials.
possible_revelations.emergence_condition: Corro is pressed on the pre-filled log.

possible_revelations.statement: Mira saw Hale pause the release log manually.
possible_revelations.emergence_condition: Mira is given a way out of dock retaliation.

moral_fault_lines.why_it_hurts: Each protects one promise by endangering another.

editorialized_lore.item: Release logs turn favors into records.
editorialized_lore.relevance_now: Hale needs a name on paper.

editorialized_lore.item: Dock courtesy is often a bill.
editorialized_lore.delivery_method: Hale calls the demand a courtesy.

human_stakes.what_is_lost: Their trust stops protecting the PC unless repaired.
The PC becomes known as too costly to help.
